tasks.subject: Task 1: Entitlements — Add iCloud Container Identifier
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `iCloud.brainmeld.Road-Beans` to `Road_Beans.entitlements` so `NSPersistentCloudKitContainer` can connect to the right container.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Road Beans/Road_Beans.entitlements`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers` array contains `iCloud.brainmeld.Road-Beans`
- `Road_Beans.Local.entitlements` is unchanged
- App builds clean

**Verify:** `xcodebuild -project "Road Beans.xcodeproj" -scheme "Road Beans" -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build` → `BUILD SUCCEEDED`

**Steps:**
- Edit `Road_Beans.entitlements`: replace empty `<array/>` for `com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers` with `<array><string>iCloud.brainmeld.Road-Beans</string></array>`
- Build to confirm
- Commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Road Beans/Road_Beans.entitlements"], "verifyCommand": "xcodebuild -project \"Road Beans.xcodeproj\" -scheme \"Road Beans\" -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers contains iCloud.brainmeld.Road-Beans", "Road_Beans.Local.entitlements unchanged", "App builds clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MigrationPromptView — Replace Dead Migrate Button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the silently-failing "Yes, migrate" button and replace it with a clear info note, an Export Backup flow, and a Keep Local Only button.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Road Beans/App/MigrationPromptView.swift`
- Modify: `Road Beans/App/RootView.swift`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `MigrationPromptView` no longer has a `migrate` parameter
- Info note explains migration is not yet supported
- "Export Backup" button triggers `exportService.writeExportFile()` then shows a `ShareLink`
- "Keep Local Only" button calls `keepLocalOnly`
- `RootView` call site compiles without the removed `migrate:` argument
- App builds clean

**Verify:** `xcodebuild -project "Road Beans.xcodeproj" -scheme "Road Beans" -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build` → `BUILD SUCCEEDED`

**Steps:**
- Rewrite `MigrationPromptView.swift`: remove `migrate` param, add `@Environment(\.dataExportService)`, `@State exportURL`, `@State isExporting`, info note Text, Export Backup button with async prepareExport(), conditional ShareLink, Keep Local Only button
- Update `RootView.swift` line 14-19: replace multi-line `MigrationPromptView(keepLocalOnly:migrate:)` with `MigrationPromptView(keepLocalOnly: persistence.deferMigration)`
- Build, commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Road Beans/App/MigrationPromptView.swift", "Road Beans/App/RootView.swift"], "verifyCommand": "xcodebuild -project \"Road Beans.xcodeproj\" -scheme \"Road Beans\" -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MigrationPromptView has no migrate parameter", "Info note present", "Export Backup button triggers writeExportFile then ShareLink", "Keep Local Only button calls keepLocalOnly", "RootView compiles", "App builds clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: BackupSettingsView — iCloud Status Section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a `Section("iCloud")` above the existing Backup section that reactively displays the current `PersistenceController.mode`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Road Beans/Features/Backup/BackupSettingsView.swift`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `BackupSettingsView` reads `PersistenceController` via `@Environment(PersistenceController.self)`
- `Section("iCloud")` appears above the existing `Section("Backup")`
- All four `PersistenceMode` cases show correct icon, color, label
- No new environment keys or services introduced
- App builds clean

**Verify:** `xcodebuild -project "Road Beans.xcodeproj" -scheme "Road Beans" -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build` → `BUILD SUCCEEDED`

**Steps:**
- Add `@Environment(PersistenceController.self) private var persistence` to `BackupSettingsView`
- Insert `Section("iCloud") { switch persistence.mode { … } }` before existing `Section { … } header: { Text("Backup") }`
- Four cases: cloudKitBacked=green checkmark.icloud.fill, localOnly=secondary icloud.slash, pendingMigration=orange icloud.and.arrow.up, pendingRelaunch=orange exclamationmark.icloud
- Build, commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Road Beans/Features/Backup/BackupSettingsView.swift"], "verifyCommand": "xcodebuild -project \"Road Beans.xcodeproj\" -scheme \"Road Beans\" -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BackupSettingsView has @Environment(PersistenceController.self)", "Section iCloud appears above Section Backup", "All four PersistenceMode cases handled", "No new env keys", "App builds clean"]}
```
